programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Georgian Edinburghs finest architecture, the origins of `Auld Reekie, the roots of modern Scottishness, and some dark imperial controversies.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores Manchesters history of protest and revolution during the Industrial Revolution, from Marx to the Suffragettes and the Peterloo massacre.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes 45 miles through the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the areas rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At the impressively preserved Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps Tony relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. Tony finishes in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series Tony takes on a tough four-day trek through the Kintail region of the west Scottish Highlands to discover the story of the Jacobite uprisings of the early 1700s. On three occasions, Highland armies, assisted by the French and the Spanish, attempted to overthrow the King and put a Stuart back on the throne.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Finds include the lost WWI training trenches on Salisbury Plain, Britains first `double henge, discovered just down the road from Stonehenge, where the evidence suggests our ancestors feasted and made sacred offerings as part of a visit to the ritualistic Stonehenge landscape, and luxury foreign goods discovered at Tintagel, the legendary childhood home of King Arthur.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The team is in the north of Britain where they uncover evidence of the first Roman siege in Britain, Scottish man-made islands and a famous monastery.

programme.title: Truthseekers
programme.desc: With unimaginable wealth and power, Cleopatra was the most important woman of her time. Yet, the tomb of the most famous woman of the ancient world has still not been found.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin visit a one-bedroom flat in Catford, London, a large house near the River Mersey and a semi-detached property in Alvaston in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An end-terrace house in Alfreton in Derby bought by two brothers, a mid-terrace on the coast at Seaham in County Durham and a large three-storey property with a flat and shop in Taylorstown in the Rhondda Valley are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin talk to the new owners to find out what they have planned for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts falls in love with a quirky cottage in Malvern bought by a builder and his wife, Dion Dublin talks to a first-time property developer who sees her end-terrace house in Chell in Stoke-on-Trent as something for her pension pot, and Lucy Alexander meets a divorced couple who have decided to form a new union as property developers doing up a shop and flat in Dover, Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large piece of land in Ratby in Leicestershire, a terrace in Chesterton in Staffordshire and a 1930s semi with a huge garden and huge potential are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the developers hoping to breathe new life into their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A two-bedroom detached house in Basford in Nottingham, a top floor flat in Portsmouth and a large Edwardian terrace in Crewe are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear about their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A multimillion-pound development in Farningham in Kent, an ambitious, total renovation project in Aspatria in Cumbria and a very small studio flat in Wallington in Surrey are all sold under the hammer. Martin and Lucy meet the new owners to discuss their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A Victorian terrace in Londons Greenwich, two flats in Chatham in Kent and a riverside inn near Great Yarmouth in Norfolk are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the new owners and hear plans for their renovation projects.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A three-bedroom house in Borrowash in Derbyshire, another three-bedder in West Bromwich in the Midlands and a quirky four-bedroom house on the Isle of Sheppey are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat in Pegswood in Northumberland, a terrace in Swadlincote in Derbyshire and a former shop in Chatham in Kent are given makeovers.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house in Wales, a basement office in central London with a huge price tag and two flats in Bootle near Liverpool are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy meets a young couple expecting a baby who have to weigh up whether to live in their auction buy in Sydenham in London while Martin talks to a man and his father in law who have bought their first property together in Trentham near Stoke and Dion meets a man who only went into property development after he retired. His latest buy is a three-bed semi in West Bromwich.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Terraced houses in Tunstall in Shropshire and Prescott in Liverpool and a large flat in Dagenham are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion have a look round before hearing what the new owners have planned.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A chiropodist, two part-time gardeners and a woman who works on projects in between the school run are todays investors. Theyve bought property in Bullbridge in Derbyshire, Newcastle under Lyme in Staffordshire and Wolverhampton in the West Midlands under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts follows the progress of a couple developing a chalet bungalow in Drakelowe in Staffordshire for their family, while Lucy Alexander talks to a young entrepreneur with grand plans for a three-bed semi in Croydon in London. Dion Dublin looks round a piece of land which runs alongside a tourist steam train track in Coltishall in Norfolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts rolls back the clock nearly 12 years to catch up on an ambitious development of a former church in Preston on the Hill in Cheshire, while Lucy Alexander looks round two very different terraced houses in Stoney Stratford, near Milton Keynes, and Streatham in London.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s terrace in Croydon, a semi in Wolstanton destined to be a family home and the only house on a street in Moorside in Oldham are all under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion visit the properties and meet the new owners.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A semi in Sutton Coldfield near Birmingham, a derelict house in a rural village near Dover in Kent and a basement without planning permission in Ipswich in Suffolk are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 20-year-old first-time developer, a banker turned developer and a builder who wants to create a new home for his soon-to-be-wife all buy properties at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion are in Chesterton, Hornchurch and Sudbrook to hear their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A run-down listed village house in Farningham in Kent is given the wow factor while houses in Great Barr in Birmingham and Crewe in Cheshire are also given great makeovers. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and catch up on their progress after the transformations.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The police launch a search when Nick, George and Greengrass are locked in the cellar of the Aidensfield Arms overnight by robbers, who make off with the contents of the till. Its not until morning that the trio are discovered by a man delivering beer to the pub. Elsewhere, Greengrass told Nick that Dave Chapman is trading in stolen farm machinery.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Reg Manston has built up his pedigree herd through years of back-breaking work and now has to face losing it all. The outbreak is reported to Nick and he goes to investigate. At first Manston denies that there is anything wrong, and then he relents and lets a vet examine the animal.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a young soldier injures his sadistic sergeant during an army exercise, he hides out in a nearby forest, stealing food to survive. Nick is then called to investigate a series of break-ins, and he realises that the thefts are linked to the deserter.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A depressed Rosie Tinniswood is convinced her husband is in prison for a crime he did not commit and takes an overdose, leaving Nick reluctantly in charge of her children. Elsewhere, Phil is to marry his girlfriend who says shes pregnant.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The death of wealthy aristocrat Sir Freddy Butler brings Barnaby and Jones to the privileged surroundings of Haddington Hall. It looks like Freddy suffered a heart attack, but when his will disappears and his lawyer is killed in an arson attack, the detectives close in on Freddys family. What are they hiding, and where are the mysterious Haddington diamonds?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the body of arrogant local beauty Melissa Townsend is discovered by the pool at her manor house, DCI Barnaby uncovers a seedy world of adultery and deceit within the affluent rural community.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A particularly dangerous rapist is at large on Frosts patch and Superintendent Mullett, worried about public and press perceptions as usual, puts WPC Wallace on the case to add a `womans insight into the investigations. In his effort to trap the rapist, Frost exposes the junior officer to danger. He has been out on a limb before, but never this far.

programme.desc: As a comic, Kendra Cunningham has been compared to Groucho Marx and Mae West.

programme.title: Keith Barany: Dude... Seriously?
programme.desc: Theres no doubt Keith Barany delivers the laughs, every single time he hits the stage. As a tested and veteran touring pro, Keith could explain for hours about the subtle skill set he employs to make the laughs happen.

programme.title: Mike Siegel: Have Jokes, Will Travel
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian, TV host and actor Mike Siegel performs different acts and entertains with hilarious takes on numerous subjects.

programme.title: Dan Megini: Been There, DUMB that!

programme.title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: No funny topic is off-limits for this California native, but hes just telling his story.

programme.title: Karen Mills: Pink Pants
programme.desc: Karen Mills has made a career out of making people laugh; shes been a nationally touring comedian for 25 years.

programme.title: Joey ILO: Just Work With What You Got
programme.desc: Joey ILO takes to the stage to cracks joke with his iconic relatable style.

programme.title: Jimmy Della Valle: Famous Nobody
programme.desc: Jimmy delivers hilarious stories and one-liners from his unique, streetwise point of view.

programme.title: Fred Klett: One of Ten
programme.desc: Fred Klett showing off his clean comedy trademark, appealing to families with members of all ages with material taken from his experiences growing up in a large Christian family.

programme.title: DC Benny: You Dont Look Funny
programme.desc: Benny lives in Brooklyn where he fiddles around with old Land Rovers when he is supposed to be helping his wife run her natural skincare business.

programme.title: Dave Goldstein: Isnt It Obvious?
programme.desc: According to David Goldstein, the only hard part of being full of crap is deciding which direction youll take it; any day with a glue gun is a good day, only plumbers and Americans wear pants to spas, and good looks coincide with temperature change.

programme.title: Eleanor Morton: Has Peaked
programme.desc: Comedian and reluctant online hit, Eleanor Morton presents a brand-new surreal and offbeat show.

programme.title: Tony Law: And Now Begin In Again
programme.desc: Fresh from a critically acclaimed run at The Edinburgh Fringe Festival, Neanderthal Canadian-Trinidadian Norn Iron loon Law, is taking his half-baked thoughts on the last couple of years (with a little time travel to boot) on tour.

programme.title: Kiri Pritchard McLean: Hysterical Woman
programme.desc: Welsh-born comedian Kiri Pritchard-McLean asks "Why is female treated as a genre?"

programme.title: Jonathan Pie: Back to the Studio
programme.desc: The irate news reporter comes to the Hammersmith Apollo for a night of political stand-up. A frustrated news journalist best known for venting his spleen in `off-camera rants, this show sees him attacking both sides of the political divide.

programme.title: Jake Donaldson: Neurotica
programme.desc: Jake Donaldson is a male comedian who just wants to be a good feminist, but he grew up in the 90s and has a `proper man for a dad, so now he feels bad about not being able to put up a shelf.

programme.title: Njambi McGrath: Breaking Black
programme.desc: Njambi McGrath offers acerbic anecdotes about life in Kenya, living in a white neighbourhood, why immigrants are attracted to the UK, and how they thrive amongst certain hostilities.

programme.desc: Bright, breezy and a breath of fresh air, Beckys feel good story-telling on love, sexuality, feminism, and embarrassing dads is all charm.

programme.desc: Mr Krabs throws an event to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting is own on the same day in `Company Picnic, and then in `Pull Up a Barrel, Mr Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his Navy days.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Under the Small Top; Squidwards Sick Daze
programme.desc: Squidwards house becomes infested with a mail-order flea circus meant for SpongeBob; Squidward fakes being sick to get out of work, but his agony only begins when SpongeBob arrives to care for him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob and Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, its up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pankton wins the cutest baby contest and becomes the face of a baby food brand; when Squidwards one-off portrait of SpongeBob takes the art world by storm, he has no choice but to produce more.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Big Bad Bubble Bass; Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club
programme.desc: Karen tells the fairytale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbours. Squidward hosts a secret We Hate SpongeBob Club at his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets left with a mess when SpongeBob and Patrick use carrier clams to send messages to each other. After cooking his kazillionth Krabby Patty, SpongeBob believes hes developed an allergy to them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew get lazy when their mums take over the Krusty Krab. Patricks new pet rock catches the eye of a mischievous rock collector.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods in A Cabin in the Kelp, then in The Hankering, Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something... surprising!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick hes his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty. When Mr Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Ma and Pas Big Hurrah; Yellow Pavement
programme.desc: When SpongeBobs parents come to visit, their thirst for thrills comes as a big surprise; an educational driving film.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Ghost of Plankton; My Two Krabses
programme.desc: Plankton takes some lessons from the Flying Dutchman in The Ghost of Plankton, then in My Two Krabses, Mr. Krabs gets ready for a hot date, but SpongeBob and Patrick are not the best help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Delivery of Doom; My Father the Boat
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to otheir secret lair in 10 minutes or less. When Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside of Pearls new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.sub-title: Are You Smarter Than a Smart Cabin?; Deep Sea Despot
programme.desc: In order to avoid doing chores, Sandy invents a "Smart Cabin"; Squidward takes over as Camp Master.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: Patrick and Octo must survive together in the forest after Octo twists all of his ankles. The adults sneak off to play a board game, but one of the campers is not easily shaken off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Something Narwhal This Way Comes; C.H.U.M.S
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBobs past visit; Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: An accident-prone yellow sea sponge, who works in a fast-food restaurant, has adventures with his friends in the underwater city of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Delivery to Monster Island; Ride Patrick Ride
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Plankton must work together to survive an island of deadly monsters; SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Sweet and Sour Squidward; The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward to steal the Krabby Patty formula in `Sweet and Sour Squidward, and then in `The Googly Artiste, Patricks painted rocks with googly eyes are an artistic hit.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.sub-title: A Finful of Sand Dollars /Cretins of the Night
programme.desc: Its Kamp Korals first ever Wild West Day! SpongeBob and Patrick become vampires for a night.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward and Bubble Bass are forced to tolerate each others company on a trip to Shell City; Squidward takes a trip inside the imagination box and must rely on SpongeBob and Patricks creativity in order to escape.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: Stair Wars; Enemies a la Mode
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict; members of the Star family confront their absurd rivalries.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Arbor Day Disarray; Aint That the Tooth
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected; SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.desc: The campers meet two backwoods narwhals named Narlene and Nobby, who treat them to a sweet surprise.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.sub-title: Nut Madness / Mermaid Men and Barnacle Boys
programme.desc: Things get wild when Sandy goes feral over a nut. A super-duo rivalry threatens to destroy the camp.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: A Place for Pets; Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realises pets are more profitable than owners; Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that imitation is the sincerest form of flattery. When worms move in to SpongeBobs holes, he has to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Treats!; For Here or to Go
programme.desc: SpongeBob brings home a box of new snail treats for Gary and Plankton wins a free krabby patty.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: Super Stars; Now Museum, Now You Dont
programme.desc: The Star family is a superhero team; Cecil works as a security guard at Lady Upturns art museum.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick wakes up off-model. The Star family works at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods in A Cabin in the Kelp, then in The Hankering, Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something... surprising!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Patricks Coupon; Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but hell have to get to the store if he wants to use it! Krabs buys Squidwards art, but to make a profit on his purchase hell have to get the artist out of the picture!

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.desc: Counselor Squidward is determined for his cabin to win the annual camp art competition. The Kamp Koral campers befriend a cute cow with a big appetite.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Perch Perkins fights for his job after hes fired and replaced by a robot anchorman; SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward feel the heat when they become volunteer firefighters.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them - and their `world tour himself.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: The Patrick Show Sells Out; Neptunes Ball
programme.desc: The Patrick Show gets competing sponsors; the star family visits King Neptunes palace.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L.; frustrated that hes seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww."

programme.sub-title: A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering

programme.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBobs Under Years
programme.desc: After SpongeBob and Patrick eat an experiment, Plankton must counteract the monstrous side effects. Elsewhere, Mr Crab must find a babysitter for Pearl, but she proves to be demanding to care for.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Now that Freds leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harms way. Patricks lemonade stand is not doing too well, until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pearl has a facial blemish right before the big school dance in `Barnacle Face, and in `Pet Sitter Pat, SpongeBob asks Patrick to look after Gary while hes away at Grandmas birthday party.

programme.sub-title: Krabsy the Klown/Lords of the LARP

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Bikini Bottom prepares for a sleigh race where the prize is $1 million, but plans change when they discover Planktons scheme to steal the Krabby Patty formula during the race.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: Gas Station Vacation; Bunny the Barbarian
programme.desc: The Star Family heads to their favourite resort in Gas Station Vacation, then in Bunny the Barbarian, Bunny goes on a mid-day adventure to a forgotten age.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: The Commode Episode; Tying the Klop-Knot
programme.desc: Patrick gets stuck in the bathroom; Bunny and Cecil need to get married again.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, its the new teacher who learns a lesson. When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost.

programme.desc: Drew takes Viki to his favourite treasure hunting grounds. Together, they pick through a dusty old shed, a quality auction, and a beautiful country house.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneer Natasha Raskin Sharp and ceramics expert Steven Moore are on a whistle-stop tour of Tyne and Wear before wandering north to Northumberland. Natasha wastes little time in the antiques shops, gambling her kitty like an 18th-century taverngoer buying some George III period gaming tokens. She ditches the 1960s Rolls Royce and sets off on a very unlikely safari to catch sight of an ancient creature that still roams the Northumberland plains.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus Ashworth and his team perform house clearances and uncover hidden gems. What will these antiques sell for at auction?

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: D-Day veteran Thomas Hassell has brought along a treasured item with a proud history: a smart military `swagger stick awarded to him while on army service in Berlin. Metalworker Dominic Chinea enlists the help of Englands last remaining master cooper, Alastair Simms, to tackle the repair of a miniature whisky barrel.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam continue their travel around Northern Ireland and discover lovely vintage cars, along with some modern motors. Sam loves a Sunbeam-Talbot, Henry, a lovely Ford Capri. What will they take home as their last item of the season?

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Presenter Henry Cole and motorcycle restorer Sam Lovegrove are in the Cotswolds to visit the largest sidecar manufacturer in Britain. They uncover a rusty Lancia Aurelia and a Royal Enfield 500.

He was a gift from her beloved grandmother, who helped to raise her, and Wol is constant reminder of her grandmothers love. But the decades of hugs and kisses have rather worn out Wol, and he could really do with the expert care of bear ladies Amanda and Julie. Musical maestro David Burville welcomes Kathryn Freeman from Hertfordshire. He is excited to get his healing hands on her familys miniature piano, which is now in a sorry state. programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus travels the underworld to defeat the evil god Hades, who seeks to overthrow Zeus and bring hell to Earth.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: After the triumph of the machines on Judgement Day and with killer robots hunting down the last vestiges of humanity, resistance fighter John Connor battles back. However, the arrival of a mysterious stranger threatens to tip the balance in favour of the machines.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time before the pyramids, an evil king threatens to take over the world, so the leaders of the remaining tribes under threat call upon a desert warrior to help them defeat the wicked one and his brutal hordes. As the warrior battles against the evil around him, he is preparing for a final showdown that will decide if it is to be his destiny to become the great Scorpion King.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brians heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The evil mummy Imhotep returns to wreak havoc as he resumes his relentless search for power and immortality. To make matters worse, another ancient evil has been unleashed, even more dangerous than Imhotep. Only the heroic Rick OConnell and his intrepid Egyptologist wife stand in the way of these twin terrors as they embark upon a desperate mission to save the world.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China II
programme.desc: A martial arts teacher protects his students and his aunt from a fanatical cult seeking to drive the Europeans out of China.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China II
programme.desc: A martial arts teacher protects his students and his aunt from a fanatical cult seeking to drive the Europeans out of China.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.title: Justice League Vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman, Batman and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! The Sword and the Scoob
programme.desc: An evil sorceress transports the gang back to the age chivalrous knights, spell-casting wizards, and fire-breathing dragons.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: The village is being overrun by rabbits and Wallace has a plan to alter their minds so that they will leave the vegetable allotments alone. However, his plan goes awry and the rabbit problem escalates when the villagers discover a monstrous `were-rabbit destroying everything in its sights. Will Wallace and Gromit be able to solve the conundrum before the creature gets shot?

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he cant sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesnt belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumbles son Erik hasnt yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adelie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: When the transition is being made from silent films to `talkies, everyone has trouble adapting. Don and Lina have been cast repeatedly as a romantic couple, but when their latest film is remade into a musical, only Don has the voice for the new singing part. After a lot of practise with a diction coach, Lina still sounds terrible, and Kathy, a bright young aspiring actress, is hired to record over her voice.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Valentines Day

programme.title: A Star Is Born

programme.title: Rob Peace

programme.title: Jackie

programme.title: The Emoji Movie

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: The Lawnmower Man
programme.desc: Visually arresting thriller about a researcher who uses a mentally disabled gardener for ill-advised experiments in inducing mental development through virtual reality simulations. At first, the simulations seem to enhance the lawnmower mans mental powers, but then the experiment goes haywire. Based on a short story by Stephen King.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A modern-day teenager is transported back to the 1950s, where he encounters his mother and father in their youth.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II
programme.desc: Time-travel sequel with Marty McFly and the eccentric inventor Doc Brown travelling back and forth in time to stop their nemesis tampering with history. By stealing the time machine and travelling back in time himself, Biff Tannen gives his younger self a book containing fifty years of sports statistics which he uses to amass an enormous gambling fortune and power.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly travels to the American Wild West of 1885 in a desperate bid to save Doc Brown from becoming another victim of a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Logans Run
programme.desc: In 2274, computers rule a hermetically sealed city housing the survivors of a holocaust that has decimated the earth. Life is hedonistic and happy for the citys inhabitants; unfortunately they must be terminated when they reach 30. When Logan 5, a trained hunter for the system, grows intrigued by a beautiful young woman, he is forced to question the fundamental principles of his society and decides he must flee.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd

At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon

programme.title: American Star
programme.desc: An assassin on his last assignment travels to Fuerteventura to kill a man hes never met.

programme.title: Psycho

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Thriller adapted from Thomas Harriss first Hannibal Lecter novel about an FBI profiler called out of retirement to help catch a serial killer nicknamed the Tooth Fairy. The agent has the uncanny ability to project himself into the minds of his criminal prey, but the case forces him to confront his past and consult his former nemesis - the now-incarcerated Dr Hannibal Lecter.

programme.title: Oceans Thirteen
programme.desc: The remaining members of Danny Oceans gang regroup to jeopardise the nefarious plans of a businessman who double-crossed one of Dannys old friends. The team plan to ruin the opening of his glitzy Las Vegas casino and hotel by rigging the games and ensuring that every punter goes home with a jackpot.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyers colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: Hallow Road
programme.desc: Two parents receive a distressing late-night call from their teenage daughter, who has just accidentally hit a pedestrian. They jump in their car, racing to get there before anyone else. Disturbing revelations threaten to tear the family apart.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: A middle-aged man reaches breaking point while gridlocked in Los Angeles traffic on a sweltering day. programme.desc: The team investigate Tissington, an ancient family home which once witnessed a tragedy. In 1862, resident Wilhelmina Fitzherbert died due to severe burns and is said to still roam the hall.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Tretower court and castle in Wales, which is reportedly inhabited by the ghost of a white lady thought to be the wife of Roger Vaughan who built Tretower Court in the 1400s.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit the American Legion in Hollywood, once a favourite haunt for military and Hollywood stars. Derek picks up on a couple of celebs in the bar and gets in touch with an old custodian who died in the building.

programme.title: The Concise History of WWII
programme.desc: From Germanys dramatic invasion of Poland, France, and Russia, to the Battle of Britain, the key battles in Africa, and onto the attack of Pearl Harbour and the eventual defeat of the Nazi army in Stalingrad. This programme focuses on all the major events of this period, and also pays particular attention to the wars final year and the gradual destruction of the German army.

programme.title: WW2: The Road to Berlin
programme.desc: The Battle of Stalingrad was the bloodiest and most destructive battle of the Second World War, taking countless lives, and obliterating an ideologically and industrially important Soviet city. E1.

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II
programme.desc: As soon as RAF Bomber Command struck back at Nazi Germany, it began to suffer unsustainable losses. A team of British paratroopers was sent to Bruneval to seize a radar system and its precious wavelengths in order to drastically reduce the losses suffered. This documentary explores the raid with the use of veterans accounts, archive film, and reconstructions.

programme.desc: Sharon is approaching her 30th birthday but is unable to see a bright future ahead of her, merely one which matches up to her past. Tracey would like to throw a party for her, but has problems with the guest list.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Very Last of the Summer Wine: How Not to Cry at Weddings
programme.desc: Theres excitement in the air as everyone is getting ready for the wedding. Later as the guests arrive at the pub, Glenda receives a call to say the bridegroom has done a runner.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo, Clegg, and Blamire go around town discussing life and death, and observe their fellow townspeople and their problems.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: At the library, Blamire, Clegg, and Compo are thrown out by Mr. Wainright. Compo realises he has lost his key and, upon discovering the library is closed, the trio try to find Mr Wainwright. They find he has gone to a formal dinner dance, and now they have to find their way into the party.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: After two fisherman find a farmers body in a river, Detective Inspector Mike Shepherd is dispatched to the rural town of Brokenwood to investigate the suspicious death.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When an elderly ladys body is discovered, part consumed by her hordes of cats, the death is dismissed as a tragic accident. When its discovered that she has disinherited her relatives in favour of her beloved pets, Jack becomes convinced its murder.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Havers is spending her compensation money learning Aikido at a retreat in Cornwall. Lynley is also in Cornwall visiting his mother, when a horse trainer who lives on a neighbouring estate is found hanged in his stable. It seems like suicide, but when Lynley discovers a connection to a local smuggling racket he becomes suspicious.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried decides to take on a new student for a bit of practical experience but Calum is none too pleased but the student is a close friends only child and he wont hear any complaints.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Mike Shepherd investigates and solves murder mysteries in a New Zealand country town.

programme.title: Expedition Volcano
programme.desc: An expedition to one of the worlds most dangerous, spectacular and least known volcanoes, Nyiragongo. This volcano contains a massive boiling cauldron of molten rock, the worlds largest continually active lava lake.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey

The weekend brings with it a big reunion, as everyone meets up for the christening of Neil the baby, but how will Smithy react to news from Nessa that it is a double celebration?

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: When Reverend Pottle, the 102-year-old vicar of Dibley village dies, the locals are shocked to discover that his replacement is a woman. Geraldine invites all and sundry to call her Gerry, but the breath of fresh air she brings looks like turning into a foul wind as the chairman of the parish wants her removed.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and self-taught chef Big Zuu takes his food truck to Croydon to meet with Jimmy Carr and cook his ultimate meal ready for when he steps off stage.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and chef Big Zuu is off to Portsmouth to cook the perfect post performance meal for comedian Rosie Jones including fresh fish and chips just like her Nanna made.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu is going regal as he heads to Royal Leamington Spa to meet and eat with comedian and actor Guz Khan. Leamington was once a place Queen Victoria visited, now its the mandems turn.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway begin their journey at South Kensington, home of Victoria and Albert Museum, the Science Museum and the Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway are heading to a stunning station you wont find on modern-day tube maps - Dover Street, now known as Green Park.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: What is left behind when urban areas are abandoned? Hear about some extraordinary ghost towns, including Pripyat - frozen in time after Chernobyl - and Hashima Island.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The eerie world of abandoned space age projects, including the HARP gun in Barbados and the mountainside Barcroft Observatory in California.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Magnificent bridges that time forgot: Goat Canyon Trestle in California was destroyed by a hurricane, while Kinzua Viaduct was destroyed by a tornado.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Once-great triumphs of marine engineering now left to rust include a ship graveyard in Maryland colonised by wildlife, and a Cold War sub.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Disused structures that were once at the forefront of power supply, including Kelenfold Power Station in Budapest and Wardenclyffe Tower in New York.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused parts of Piccadilly Circus, the grandest station on the London Underground, and visit the long-abandoned Highgate surface station.

programme.desc: A skier falls over on a steep slope and suffers a suspected brain injury in Wakefield and a DIY enthusiasts attempts to fix the heating in his chilly home end in disaster.

programme.title: Butchers of the Bayou
programme.desc: May 31, 2002, Charlotte Murray Pace, an LSU graduate, is found raped and stabbed to death in her home. The brutality of the crime scene reminded police of the unsolved case of Gina Wilson Green from 2001, who was murdered in a similar way.

programme.title: Butchers of the Bayou
programme.desc: The investigation focuses on a white man with a white pick-up truck. March 1994, Ann Bryan is found murdered in her home at St James retirement centre. Despite attempts to catch her killer, her case goes cold.

programme.title: Prison Girls
programme.desc: Accused of defrauding an elderly person, Tonika has been struggling to cope in jail. She wants her husband to bail her out, but after two weeks behind bars, its the women in her anger management class who are helping her most.

programme.title: Prison Girls
programme.desc: Linda is already planning her next big heist, stealing the ingredients for a celebratory feast when she gets out. But when jail life becomes depressingly familiar, she is forced to accept that confronting her demons may be the only way out.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo is in Cornwalls county town, Truro, with his 1930s Bradshaws Guide. In the surrounding countryside, he finds the historic estate of Trewithen, whose gardens were stocked from China by professional plant hunters commissioned by its owner. The Atlantic Coast branch line carries Michael north to Newquay.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Clutching his 1930s Bradshaws Guide, Michael Portillo reaches Bodmin en route to Totnes as he explores the West Country from St Ives to Salisbury Plain. Out on the rugged moor, Michael hears how the celebrated author, Daphne du Maurier, captivated readers between the wars with her tales of smuggling at the Jamaica Inn.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos exploration of the West Country continues in south Devon. Guided by his 1930s Bradshaws, Michael arrives in Paignton to investigate an extraordinarily high murder rate in the literature of the 1930s. The Dartmouth Steam Railway conveys him in style to the beautiful home of Agatha Christie, in the company of her great-grandson, James Prichard.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the county line from Devon into Somerset on his rail exploration of the West Country steered by his 1930s Bradshaws guide. He sees first-hand how willow farmers sought to overcome the challenge from the production of synthetic plastics during the 1930s. He hears how tourism for all budgets spread across the region.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasnt seen the light of day in thirty years.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Theres Hollywood glamour in the air as Derek heads out to pick up a Rolls Royce that once belonged to Fred Astaire.

programme.title: Adolf Hitlers War
programme.desc: Hitlers War moves to its endgame as the Soviets cross the German border. With a death toll of over 40 million, a new, scarred Europe will emerge.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: New. Looking at some incredible tales from war, including Churchills plan to create a giant ice ship, ghost planes that fly themselves and a Nazi treasure hunt for the Amber Room.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team visit the Ulster Folk Museum near Belfast, where treasures include stained glass, teacups from a luxury ocean liner and an unusual piece of medical history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow returns to Woodhorn Museum in Northumberland, a former colliery that tells the story of coal mining and the miners way of life in the north east of England.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible - an iconic hot hatch - along with a wooden launch boat and catch-up on a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super-rare Renault Clio Williams 2 in F1 blue with contrasting gold alloys has turned Dave Mathewson an interesting shade of green.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning in Canterbury in Kent, Michael treads the boards as he uncovers the political message behind a play, published in 1936, inspired by the 12th century murder of Archbishop Thomas a Becket. In Maidstone, he learns of the international origins of the most British symbol of remembrance before paying his respects at a war memorial based on Londons Cenotaph.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Following his 1936 Bradshaws guidebook, Michael Portillo explores the east of England, in London and Essex, en route to Lincolnshire.On this leg, he alights at Limehouse in East London for Cable Street, which became the focus of Britains fight against fascism in the 1930s. Heading east, he arrives in Dagenham, the location of one of Henry Fords first car factories in the UK.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos railway journey through 1930s Britain from Canterbury to Skegness reaches Witham in Essex. Here he visits the factory of the worlds oldest supplier of metal framed windows which became popular in the thirties.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Stopping at Saxmundham in Suffolk, Michael heads for Snape Maltings, a concert and arts venue, and learns how the music and life of one of Britains greatest composers was shaped by the sea and his Suffolk surroundings. Striking north, Michaels next stop is the Norfolk seaside resort of Great Yarmouth.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
